# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

Select all that are appropriate.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Suggested documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

As a minimum, all changes must be loaded onto the project hardware to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Test A - Revised code loaded onto project hardware and successfully tested on the workbench
- [ ] Test B - Revised code loaded onto project hardware and successfully operated and test flown
- [ ] Test C - Revised code loaded onto project hardware and tested with expected outcomes

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have performed tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works

## Transparency:

- [ ] My code was created with AI assistance.
